prompt: A gritty manga-style full-body street portrait of a tall young woman with soft pink hair in a long side braid, walking straight toward the viewer down a narrow rainy Japanese alley at night. Her expression is obscured by a soft mosaic-like blur over the face, creating an anonymous censored look. She wears a long black trench coat over a white dress shirt, black necktie, and high-waisted black trousers, with one hand in her coat pocket and the other holding a lit cigarette low by her side. Thin streams of cigarette smoke curl outward, mixing with the rain. The alley is dense with glowing vertical shop signs and warm lantern light reflected on wet pavement, with overhead wires and dark building facades framing the scene. Include 3 visible background pedestrians with umbrellas: 1 blue umbrella figure on the left midground, 1 reddish-brown umbrella figure in the center-right background, and 1 green umbrella figure on the right midground. Add 1 vertical white sign on the far left with black Japanese text, 1 large stylized black sound-effect text near the upper left, and 1 white speech bubble on the right containing only an ellipsis. Use dramatic noir lighting, heavy black inks, halftone screentone shading, detailed crosshatching, slight paper texture, and the composition of a serialized seinen manga panel, centered and symmetrical, moody, cinematic, and rain-soaked.
